name: gameinputjs
description: Browser library to upgrade the Gamepad API experience

scripts.docs: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('./dist/docs', { recursive: true, force: true })" && npx jsdoc -c jsdoc.conf.json
scripts.pre-build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); fs.rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true }); fs.cpSync('demo', 'dist/demo', { recursive: true }); fs.mkdirSync('dist/demo/img', { recursive: true }); fs.cpSync('img', 'dist/demo/img', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('LICENSE', 'dist/LICENSE'); fs.copyFileSync('README.md', 'dist/README.md');"
scripts.build: npm run pre-build && node -e "require('fs').cpSync('src', 'dist', { recursive: true, filter: (src) => !src.endsWith('.test.js') })"
scripts.serve: npm run build && npx serve dist
scripts.build-prod: npm run build && npm run docs

author: Samuel Sarette
